qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist A (serial #7) keeps guarded fast mode while increasing concrete code-step density for D1-D4

executionHints.description: Checklist A (serial #7) uses guarded fast mode with denser D-round patch sets and full unattended safety budget

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, use explicit reset to avoid stale code-step invocation state

D1.description: Extract default action/source/fallback literals into helpers and route existing default functions through those helpers

D2.description: Introduce non-ip/cidr/ip compare helpers and route input-label plus default non-ip outputs through helper-backed literals

operations.pattern:
static const char\* wc_preclass_input_label_from_match_layer\(const char\* match_layer\)?
\{?
	if \(match_layer && strcmp\(match_layer, "cidr"\) == 0\)?
		return "cidr";?
	if \(match_layer && strcmp\(match_layer, "ip"\) == 0\)?
		return "ip";?
	return "non-ip";?
\}

D3.description: Extract policy/decision/disabled literals and route corresponding decision field helpers through literal wrappers

D4.description: Convert route-change allowance and fallback literals to helper-backed expressions so D4 remains concrete instead of noop

operations.pattern:
static const char\* wc_preclass_route_change_fallback\(const char\* fallback_reason\)?
\{?
	if \(fallback_reason && strcmp\(fallback_reason, wc_preclass_fallback_none_literal\(\)\) == 0\)?
		return "route-change-normalized";?
	return fallback_reason;?
\}
